purpose: Cross-skill routing and handoff regressions only; skill-local behavior belongs in each owner's evals directory.

cases.prompt: Implement a behavior-changing feature in this repository.
forbidden: create planning artifacts without an execution gap

cases.prompt: Explain the root cause and do not fix it yet.
Debug a failure that only happens intermittently.
expected: improve reproduction or signal before repair

cases.prompt: Implement one clear stateful feature touching an API, persistence, and several files.
expected: implement directly when authority and proof are clear
forbidden: select high from statefulness or file count
manufacture a PRD, tickets, or spec

cases.prompt: Classify one broad ordinary refactor and one change with irreversible data loss plus unclear recovery ownership.
expected: keep the broad ordinary refactor medium
select high only for material consequence plus uncertainty
forbidden: accumulate generic risk labels into high

cases.prompt: Use wayfinder to resolve the decision frontier and publish the resulting tickets.
forbidden: start implementation from publication or labels

cases.prompt: Choose the route for a clear implementation request and for the same request with an unresolved execution contract.
expected: use implementation-spec-maker for the unresolved execution delta
forbidden: require a spec for every medium change

cases.prompt: Choose delivery for one deterministic approved ticket and for an approved dependency graph.
expected: allow direct execution for the single ticket

cases.prompt: Choose reviewer topology for simple, medium, and high profiles.
expected: simple uses one reviewer_fast when gated
high uses two disjoint reviewer_deep tracks

cases.prompt: A medium Full review reports one low cleanup issue and one high shared DTO contract defect.
expected: Closure covers only the high affected contract
